309 // Token: 0x060016A2 RID: 5794 RVA: 0x004D6DD4 File Offset: 0x004D4FD4
310 public static void EnterBuildingMode()
311 {
312 if (Main.LocalPlayer.UsingOrReusingItem)
313 {
314 return;
315 }
316 SoundEngine.PlaySound(10, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
317 PlayerInput._InBuildingMode = true;
318 PlayerInput._UIPointForBuildingMode = UILinkPointNavigator.CurrentPoint;
319 if (Main.mouseItem.IsAir)
320 {
321 int uipointForBuildingMode = PlayerInput._UIPointForBuildingMode;
322 if (uipointForBuildingMode < 50 && uipointForBuildingMode >= 0 && Main.player[Main.myPlayer].inventory[uipointForBuildingMode].stack > 0)
323 {
324 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref Main.mouseItem, ref Main.player[Main.myPlayer].inventory[uipointForBuildingMode]);
325 }
326 }
327 }
328
329 // Token: 0x060016A3 RID: 5795 RVA: 0x004D6E68 File Offset: 0x004D5068
330 public static void ExitBuildingMode(bool quiet = false)
331 {
332 if (!quiet)
333 {
334 SoundEngine.PlaySound(11, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
335 }
336 PlayerInput._InBuildingMode = false;
337 UILinkPointNavigator.ChangePoint(PlayerInput._UIPointForBuildingMode);
338 if (Main.mouseItem.stack > 0 && Main.player[Main.myPlayer].itemAnimation == 0)
339 {
340 int uipointForBuildingMode = PlayerInput._UIPointForBuildingMode;
341 if (uipointForBuildingMode < 50 && uipointForBuildingMode >= 0 && Main.player[Main.myPlayer].inventory[uipointForBuildingMode].stack <= 0)
342 {
343 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref Main.mouseItem, ref Main.player[Main.myPlayer].inventory[uipointForBuildingMode]);
344 }
345 }
346 PlayerInput._UIPointForBuildingMode = -1;
347 }
348
349 // Token: 0x060016A4 RID: 5796 RVA: 0x004D6F0C File Offset: 0x004D510C
350 public static void VerifyBuildingMode()
351 {
352 if (PlayerInput._InBuildingMode)
353 {
354 Player player = Main.player[Main.myPlayer];
355 bool flag = false;
356 if (Main.mouseItem.stack <= 0)
357 {
358 flag = true;
359 }
360 if (player.dead)
361 {
362 flag = true;
363 }
364 if (flag)
365 {
366 PlayerInput.ExitBuildingMode(false);

368 }

401 // Token: 0x060016A8 RID: 5800 RVA: 0x004D6F88 File Offset: 0x004D5188
402 public static void Initialize()
403 {
404 Main.InputProfiles.OnProcessText += PlayerInput.PrettyPrintProfiles;
405 Player.Hooks.OnEnterWorld += PlayerInput.Hook_OnEnterWorld;
406 PlayerInputProfile playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Redigit's Pick");
407 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.Redigit);
408 PlayerInput.Profiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
409 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Yoraiz0r's Pick");
410 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.Yoraiz0r);
411 PlayerInput.Profiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
412 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Console (Playstation)");
413 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.ConsolePS);
414 PlayerInput.Profiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
415 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Console (Xbox)");
416 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.ConsoleXBox);
417 PlayerInput.Profiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
418 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Custom");
419 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.Redigit);
420 PlayerInput.Profiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
421 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Redigit's Pick");
422 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.Redigit);
423 PlayerInput.OriginalProfiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
424 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Yoraiz0r's Pick");
425 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.Yoraiz0r);
426 PlayerInput.OriginalProfiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
427 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Console (Playstation)");
428 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.ConsolePS);
429 PlayerInput.OriginalProfiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
430 playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile("Console (Xbox)");
431 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.ConsoleXBox);
432 PlayerInput.OriginalProfiles.Add(playerInputProfile.Name, playerInputProfile);
433 PlayerInput.SetSelectedProfile("Custom");
434 PlayerInput.Triggers.Initialize();
435 }

446 // Token: 0x060016AA RID: 5802 RVA: 0x004D7120 File Offset: 0x004D5320
447 public static bool Save()
448 {
449 Main.InputProfiles.Clear();
450 Main.InputProfiles.Put("Selected Profile", PlayerInput._selectedProfile);
451 foreach (KeyValuePair<string, PlayerInputProfile> keyValuePair in PlayerInput.Profiles)
452 {
453 Main.InputProfiles.Put(keyValuePair.Value.Name, keyValuePair.Value.Save());
454 }
455 return Main.InputProfiles.Save(true);
456 }
457
458 // Token: 0x060016AB RID: 5803 RVA: 0x004D71B8 File Offset: 0x004D53B8
459 public static void Load()
460 {
461 Main.InputProfiles.Load();
462 Dictionary<string, PlayerInputProfile> dictionary = new Dictionary<string, PlayerInputProfile>();
463 string text = null;
464 Main.InputProfiles.Get<string>("Selected Profile", ref text);
465 List<string> allKeys = Main.InputProfiles.GetAllKeys();
466 for (int i = 0; i < allKeys.Count; i++)
467 {
468 string text2 = allKeys[i];
469 if (!(text2 == "Selected Profile") && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(text2))
470 {
471 Dictionary<string, object> dictionary2 = new Dictionary<string, object>();
472 Main.InputProfiles.Get<Dictionary<string, object>>(text2, ref dictionary2);
473 if (dictionary2.Count > 0)
474 {
475 PlayerInputProfile playerInputProfile = new PlayerInputProfile(text2);
476 playerInputProfile.Initialize(PresetProfiles.None);
477 if (playerInputProfile.Load(dictionary2))
478 {
479 dictionary.Add(text2, playerInputProfile);
480 }
481 }
482 }
483 }
484 if (dictionary.Count > 0)
485 {
486 PlayerInput.Profiles = dictionary;
487 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(text) && PlayerInput.Profiles.ContainsKey(text))
488 {
489 PlayerInput.SetSelectedProfile(text);
490 return;
491 }
492 PlayerInput.SetSelectedProfile(PlayerInput.Profiles.Keys.First<string>());
493 }
494 }

581 // Token: 0x060016B0 RID: 5808 RVA: 0x004D75E0 File Offset: 0x004D57E0
582 public static void UpdateInput()
583 {
584 PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.UpdateCounters();
585 PlayerInput.Triggers.Reset();
586 PlayerInput.ScrollWheelValueOld = PlayerInput.ScrollWheelValue;
587 PlayerInput.ScrollWheelValue = 0;
588 PlayerInput.GamepadThumbstickLeft = Vector2.Zero;
589 PlayerInput.GamepadThumbstickRight = Vector2.Zero;
590 PlayerInput.GrappleAndInteractAreShared = (PlayerInput.UsingGamepad || PlayerInput.SteamDeckIsUsed) && PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.XBoxGamepad].DoGrappleAndInteractShareTheSameKey;
591 if (PlayerInput.InBuildingMode && !PlayerInput.UsingGamepad)
592 {
593 PlayerInput.ExitBuildingMode(false);
594 }
595 if (PlayerInput._canReleaseRebindingLock && PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock > 0)
596 {
597 PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock--;
598 PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.UsedMovementKey = false;
599 if (PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock == 0 && PlayerInput._memoOfLastPoint != -1)
600 {
601 UIManageControls.ForceMoveTo = PlayerInput._memoOfLastPoint;
602 PlayerInput._memoOfLastPoint = -1;
603 }
604 }
605 PlayerInput._canReleaseRebindingLock = true;
606 PlayerInput.VerifyBuildingMode();
607 bool flag = false;
608 PlayerInput.MouseInput();
609 bool flag2 = flag | PlayerInput.KeyboardInput() | PlayerInput.GamePadInput();
610 PlayerInput.Triggers.Update();
611 PlayerInput.PostInput();
612 PlayerInput.ScrollWheelDelta = PlayerInput.ScrollWheelValue - PlayerInput.ScrollWheelValueOld;
613 PlayerInput.ScrollWheelDeltaForUI = PlayerInput.ScrollWheelDelta;
614 PlayerInput.WritingText = false;
615 PlayerInput.UpdateMainMouse();
616 Main.mouseLeft = PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.MouseLeft;
617 Main.mouseRight = PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.MouseRight;
618 PlayerInput.CacheZoomableValues();
619 if (flag2 && PlayerInput.OnActionableInput != null)
620 {
621 PlayerInput.OnActionableInput();
622 }
623 }
624

627 {

629 Main.lastMouseY = Main.mouseY;

631 Main.mouseY = PlayerInput.MouseY;
632 }

1167 flag = true;

1192 // Token: 0x060016BE RID: 5822 RVA: 0x004D88A8 File Offset: 0x004D6AA8
1193 private static bool KeyboardInput()
1194 {
1195 bool flag = false;
1196 bool flag2 = false;
1197 List<Keys> pressedKeys = PlayerInput.GetPressedKeys();
1198 PlayerInput.DebugKeys(pressedKeys);
1199 if (pressedKeys.Count == 0 && PlayerInput.MouseKeys.Count == 0)
1200 {
1201 Main.blockKey = Keys.None.ToString();
1202 return false;
1203 }
1204 for (int i = 0; i < pressedKeys.Count; i++)
1205 {
1206 if (pressedKeys[i] == Keys.LeftShift || pressedKeys[i] == Keys.RightShift)
1207 {
1208 flag = true;
1209 }
1210 else if (pressedKeys[i] == Keys.LeftAlt || pressedKeys[i] == Keys.RightAlt)
1211 {
1212 flag2 = true;
1213 }
1214 Main.ChromaPainter.PressKey(pressedKeys[i]);
1215 }
1216 if (Main.blockKey != Keys.None.ToString())
1217 {
1218 bool flag3 = false;
1219 for (int j = 0; j < pressedKeys.Count; j++)
1220 {
1221 if (pressedKeys[j].ToString() == Main.blockKey)
1222 {
1223 pressedKeys[j] = Keys.None;
1224 flag3 = true;
1225 }
1226 }
1227 if (!flag3)
1228 {
1229 Main.blockKey = Keys.None.ToString();
1230 }
1231 }
1232 KeyConfiguration keyConfiguration = PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.Keyboard];
1233 if (Main.gameMenu && !PlayerInput.WritingText)
1234 {
1235 keyConfiguration = PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.KeyboardUI];
1236 }
1237 List<string> list = new List<string>(pressedKeys.Count);
1238 for (int k = 0; k < pressedKeys.Count; k++)
1239 {
1240 list.Add(pressedKeys[k].ToString());
1241 }
1242 if (PlayerInput.WritingText)
1243 {
1244 list.Clear();
1245 }
1246 int count = list.Count;
1247 list.AddRange(PlayerInput.MouseKeys);
1248 bool flag4 = false;
1249 for (int l = 0; l < list.Count; l++)
1250 {
1251 if (l >= count || pressedKeys[l] != Keys.None)
1252 {
1253 string text = list[l];
1254 if (!(list[l] == Keys.Tab.ToString()) || ((!flag || SocialAPI.Mode != SocialMode.Steam) && !flag2))
1255 {
1256 if (PlayerInput.CheckRebindingProcessKeyboard(text))
1257 {
1258 return false;
1259 }
1260 KeyboardState oldKeyState = Main.oldKeyState;
1261 if (l >= count || !Main.oldKeyState.IsKeyDown(pressedKeys[l]))
1262 {
1263 keyConfiguration.Processkey(PlayerInput.Triggers.Current, text, InputMode.Keyboard);
1264 }
1265 else
1266 {
1267 keyConfiguration.CopyKeyState(PlayerInput.Triggers.Old, PlayerInput.Triggers.Current, text);
1268 }
1269 if (l >= count || pressedKeys[l] != Keys.None)
1270 {
1271 flag4 = true;
1272 }
1273 }
1274 }
1275 }
1276 if (flag4)
1277 {
1278 PlayerInput.CurrentInputMode = InputMode.Keyboard;
1279 }
1280 return flag4;
1281 }
1282

1284 private static void DebugKeys(List<Keys> keys)
1285 {

1287
1288 // Token: 0x060016C0 RID: 5824 RVA: 0x004D8B54 File Offset: 0x004D6D54
1289 private static void FixDerpedRebinds()
1290 {
1291 List<string> list = new List<string> { "MouseLeft", "MouseRight", "Inventory" };
1292 foreach (object obj in Enum.GetValues(typeof(InputMode)))
1293 {
1294 InputMode inputMode = (InputMode)obj;
1295 if (inputMode != InputMode.Mouse)
1296 {
1297 PlayerInput.FixKeysConflict(inputMode, list);
1298 foreach (string text in list)
1299 {
1300 if (PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[inputMode].KeyStatus[text].Count < 1)
1301 {
1302 PlayerInput.ResetKeyBinding(inputMode, text);
1303 }
1304 }
1305 }
1306 }
1307 }
1308
1309 // Token: 0x060016C1 RID: 5825 RVA: 0x004D8C48 File Offset: 0x004D6E48
1310 private static void FixKeysConflict(InputMode inputMode, List<string> triggers)
1311 {
1312 for (int i = 0; i < triggers.Count; i++)
1313 {
1314 for (int j = i + 1; j < triggers.Count; j++)
1315 {
1316 List<string> list = PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[inputMode].KeyStatus[triggers[i]];
1317 List<string> list2 = PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[inputMode].KeyStatus[triggers[j]];
1318 foreach (string text in list.Intersect(list2).ToList<string>())
1319 {
1320 list.Remove(text);
1321 list2.Remove(text);
1322 }
1323 }
1324 }
1325 }
1326
1327 // Token: 0x060016C2 RID: 5826 RVA: 0x004D8D24 File Offset: 0x004D6F24
1328 private static void ResetKeyBinding(InputMode inputMode, string trigger)
1329 {
1330 string text = "Redigit's Pick";
1331 if (PlayerInput.OriginalProfiles.ContainsKey(PlayerInput._selectedProfile))
1332 {
1333 text = PlayerInput._selectedProfile;
1334 }
1335 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[inputMode].KeyStatus[trigger].Clear();
1336 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[inputMode].KeyStatus[trigger].AddRange(PlayerInput.OriginalProfiles[text].InputModes[inputMode].KeyStatus[trigger]);
1337 }
1338
1339 // Token: 0x060016C3 RID: 5827 RVA: 0x004D8DB0 File Offset: 0x004D6FB0
1340 private static bool CheckRebindingProcessGamepad(string newKey)
1341 {
1342 PlayerInput._canReleaseRebindingLock = false;
1343 if (!PlayerInput.CurrentlyRebinding)
1344 {
1345 return PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock > 0;
1346 }
1347 if (PlayerInput.CurrentlyRebinding && PlayerInput._listeningInputMode == InputMode.XBoxGamepad)
1348 {
1349 PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock = 3;
1350 PlayerInput._memoOfLastPoint = UILinkPointNavigator.CurrentPoint;
1351 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1352 if (PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.XBoxGamepad].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Contains(newKey))
1353 {
1354 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.XBoxGamepad].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Remove(newKey);
1355 }
1356 else
1357 {
1358 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.XBoxGamepad].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger] = new List<string> { newKey };
1359 }
1360 PlayerInput.ListenFor(null, InputMode.XBoxGamepad);
1361 }
1362 if (PlayerInput.CurrentlyRebinding && PlayerInput._listeningInputMode == InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI)
1363 {
1364 PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock = 3;
1365 PlayerInput._memoOfLastPoint = UILinkPointNavigator.CurrentPoint;
1366 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1367 if (PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Contains(newKey))
1368 {
1369 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Remove(newKey);
1370 }
1371 else
1372 {
1373 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger] = new List<string> { newKey };
1374 }
1375 PlayerInput.ListenFor(null, InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI);
1376 }
1377 PlayerInput.FixDerpedRebinds();
1378 if (PlayerInput.OnBindingChange != null)
1379 {
1380 PlayerInput.OnBindingChange();
1381 }
1382 return PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock > 0;
1383 }
1384
1385 // Token: 0x060016C4 RID: 5828 RVA: 0x004D8F68 File Offset: 0x004D7168
1386 private static bool CheckRebindingProcessKeyboard(string newKey)
1387 {
1388 PlayerInput._canReleaseRebindingLock = false;
1389 if (!PlayerInput.CurrentlyRebinding)
1390 {
1391 return PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock > 0;
1392 }
1393 if (PlayerInput.CurrentlyRebinding && PlayerInput._listeningInputMode == InputMode.Keyboard)
1394 {
1395 PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock = 3;
1396 PlayerInput._memoOfLastPoint = UILinkPointNavigator.CurrentPoint;
1397 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1398 if (PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.Keyboard].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Contains(newKey))
1399 {
1400 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.Keyboard].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Remove(newKey);
1401 }
1402 else
1403 {
1404 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.Keyboard].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger] = new List<string> { newKey };
1405 }
1406 PlayerInput.ListenFor(null, InputMode.Keyboard);
1407 Main.blockKey = newKey;
1408 Main.blockInput = false;
1409 Main.ChromaPainter.CollectBoundKeys();
1410 }
1411 if (PlayerInput.CurrentlyRebinding && PlayerInput._listeningInputMode == InputMode.KeyboardUI)
1412 {
1413 PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock = 3;
1414 PlayerInput._memoOfLastPoint = UILinkPointNavigator.CurrentPoint;
1415 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
1416 if (PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.KeyboardUI].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Contains(newKey))
1417 {
1418 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.KeyboardUI].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger].Remove(newKey);
1419 }
1420 else
1421 {
1422 PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.KeyboardUI].KeyStatus[PlayerInput.ListeningTrigger] = new List<string> { newKey };
1423 }
1424 PlayerInput.ListenFor(null, InputMode.KeyboardUI);
1425 Main.blockKey = newKey;
1426 Main.blockInput = false;
1427 Main.ChromaPainter.CollectBoundKeys();
1428 }
1429 PlayerInput.FixDerpedRebinds();
1430 if (PlayerInput.OnBindingChange != null)
1431 {
1432 PlayerInput.OnBindingChange();
1433 }
1434 return PlayerInput.NavigatorRebindingLock > 0;
1435 }
1436
1437 // Token: 0x060016C5 RID: 5829 RVA: 0x004D914C File Offset: 0x004D734C
1438 private static void PostInput()
1439 {
1440 Main.GamepadCursorAlpha = MathHelper.Clamp(Main.GamepadCursorAlpha + ((Main.SmartCursorIsUsed && !UILinkPointNavigator.Available && PlayerInput.GamepadThumbstickLeft == Vector2.Zero && PlayerInput.GamepadThumbstickRight == Vector2.Zero) ? (-0.05f) : 0.05f), 0f, 1f);
1441 if (PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.HotbarAllowsRadial)
1442 {
1443 int num = PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.HotbarPlus.ToInt() - PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.HotbarMinus.ToInt();
1444 if (PlayerInput.MiscSettingsTEMP.HotbarRadialShouldBeUsed)
1445 {
1446 if (num == 1)
1447 {
1448 PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.RadialHotbar = true;
1449 PlayerInput.Triggers.JustReleased.RadialHotbar = false;
1450 }
1451 else if (num == -1)
1452 {
1453 PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.RadialQuickbar = true;
1454 PlayerInput.Triggers.JustReleased.RadialQuickbar = false;
1455 }
1456 }
1457 }
1458 PlayerInput.MiscSettingsTEMP.HotbarRadialShouldBeUsed = false;
1459 }
1460
1461 // Token: 0x060016C6 RID: 5830 RVA: 0x004D923C File Offset: 0x004D743C
1462 private static void HandleDpadSnap()
1463 {
1464 Vector2 vector = Vector2.Zero;
1465 Player player = Main.player[Main.myPlayer];
1466 for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
1467 {
1468 bool flag = false;
1469 Vector2 vector2 = Vector2.Zero;
1470 if (Main.gameMenu || (UILinkPointNavigator.Available && !PlayerInput.InBuildingMode))
1471 {
1472 return;
1473 }
1474 switch (i)
1475 {
1476 case 0:
1477 flag = PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.DpadMouseSnap1;
1478 vector2 = -Vector2.UnitY;
1479 break;
1480 case 1:
1481 flag = PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.DpadMouseSnap2;
1482 vector2 = Vector2.UnitX;
1483 break;
1484 case 2:
1485 flag = PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.DpadMouseSnap3;
1486 vector2 = Vector2.UnitY;
1487 break;
1488 case 3:
1489 flag = PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.DpadMouseSnap4;
1490 vector2 = -Vector2.UnitX;
1491 break;
1492 }
1493 if (PlayerInput.DpadSnapCooldown[i] > 0)
1494 {
1495 PlayerInput.DpadSnapCooldown[i]--;
1496 }
1497 if (flag)
1498 {
1499 if (PlayerInput.DpadSnapCooldown[i] == 0)
1500 {
1501 int num = 6;
1502 if (ItemSlot.IsABuildingItem(player.inventory[player.selectedItem]))
1503 {
1504 num = player.inventory[player.selectedItem].useTime;
1505 }
1506 PlayerInput.DpadSnapCooldown[i] = num;
1507 vector += vector2;
1508 }
1509 }
1510 else
1511 {
1512 PlayerInput.DpadSnapCooldown[i] = 0;
1513 }
1514 }
1515 if (vector != Vector2.Zero)
1516 {
1517 Main.SmartCursorWanted_GamePad = false;
1518 Matrix matrix = Main.GameViewMatrix.ZoomMatrix * Main.GameViewMatrix.EffectMatrix;
1519 Matrix matrix2 = Matrix.Invert(matrix);
1520 Vector2 vector3 = Vector2.Transform(Main.MouseScreen, matrix2);
1521 vector.Y *= Main.LocalPlayer.gravDir;
1522 Vector2 vector4 = Vector2.Transform((vector3 + vector * new Vector2(16f) + Main.screenPosition).ToTileCoordinates().ToWorldCoordinates(8f, 8f) - Main.screenPosition, matrix);
1523 PlayerInput.MouseX = (int)vector4.X;
1524 PlayerInput.MouseY = (int)vector4.Y;
1525 PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.SetCursorMode(CursorMode.Gamepad);
1526 }
1527 }
1528
1529 // Token: 0x060016C7 RID: 5831 RVA: 0x004D9439 File Offset: 0x004D7639
1530 private static bool ShouldShowInstructionsForGamepad()
1531 {
1532 return PlayerInput.UsingGamepad || PlayerInput.SteamDeckIsUsed;
1533 }
1534
1535 // Token: 0x060016C8 RID: 5832 RVA: 0x004D944C File Offset: 0x004D764C
1536 public static string ComposeInstructionsForGamepad()
1537 {
1538 string text = string.Empty;
1539 InputMode inputMode = InputMode.XBoxGamepad;
1540 if (Main.gameMenu || UILinkPointNavigator.Available)
1541 {
1542 inputMode = InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI;
1543 }
1544 if (PlayerInput.InBuildingMode && !Main.gameMenu)
1545 {
1546 inputMode = InputMode.XBoxGamepad;
1547 }
1548 KeyConfiguration keyConfiguration = PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[inputMode];
1549 Player localPlayer = Main.LocalPlayer;
1550 if (Main.mapFullscreen && !Main.gameMenu)
1551 {
1552 text += " ";
1553 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[56].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["Inventory"] });
1554 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.inter[118].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["HotbarPlus"] });
1555 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.inter[119].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["HotbarMinus"] });
1556 if (Main.netMode == 1 && Main.player[Main.myPlayer].HasItem(2997))
1557 {
1558 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.inter[120].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1559 }
1560 }
1561 else if (inputMode == InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI && !PlayerInput.InBuildingMode)
1562 {
1563 text = UILinkPointNavigator.GetInstructions();
1564 }
1565 else if ((localPlayer.dead && localPlayer.CanDeathSpectate && localPlayer.AnyoneToSpectate()) || localPlayer.spectating >= 0)
1566 {
1567 string textValue = Language.GetTextValue((localPlayer.spectating >= 0) ? "Game.GamepadSpectateChangeTarget" : "Game.GamepadSpectate");
1568 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(textValue, new List<string>[]
1569 {
1570 keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["Left"],
1571 keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["Right"]
1572 });
1573 if (localPlayer.spectating >= 0)
1574 {
1575 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Language.GetTextValue("Game.GamepadSpectateCancel"), new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["Jump"] });
1576 }
1577 if (localPlayer.CanWormholeToSpectating())
1578 {
1579 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Language.GetTextValue("Game.GamepadSpectateWormhole"), new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["QuickBuff"] });
1580 }
1581 }
1582 else
1583 {
1584 if (localPlayer.dead)
1585 {
1586 return text;
1587 }
1588 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[58].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["Jump"] });
1589 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[59].Value, new List<string>[]
1590 {
1591 keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["HotbarMinus"],
1592 keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["HotbarPlus"]
1593 });
1594 if (PlayerInput.InBuildingMode)
1595 {
1596 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.menu[6].Value, new List<string>[]
1597 {
1598 keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["Inventory"],
1599 keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"]
1600 });
1601 }
1602 if (WiresUI.Open)
1603 {
1604 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[53].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"] });
1605 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[56].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1606 }
1607 else
1608 {
1609 Item item = Main.player[Main.myPlayer].inventory[Main.player[Main.myPlayer].selectedItem];
1610 if (item.damage > 0 && item.ammo == 0)
1611 {
1612 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[60].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"] });
1613 }
1614 else if (item.createTile >= 0 || item.createWall > 0)
1615 {
1616 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[61].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"] });
1617 }
1618 else
1619 {
1620 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[63].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"] });
1621 }
1622 bool flag = true;
1623 bool flag2 = Main.SmartInteractProj != -1 || Main.HasInteractableObjectThatIsNotATile;
1624 bool flag3 = !Main.SmartInteractShowingGenuine && Main.SmartInteractShowingFake;
1625 if (Main.SmartInteractShowingGenuine || Main.SmartInteractShowingFake || flag2)
1626 {
1627 if (Main.SmartInteractNPC != -1)
1628 {
1629 if (flag3)
1630 {
1631 flag = false;
1632 }
1633 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[80].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1634 }
1635 else if (flag2)
1636 {
1637 if (flag3)
1638 {
1639 flag = false;
1640 }
1641 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[79].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1642 }
1643 else if (Main.SmartInteractX != -1 && Main.SmartInteractY != -1)
1644 {
1645 if (flag3)
1646 {
1647 flag = false;
1648 }
1649 Tile tile = Main.tile[Main.SmartInteractX, Main.SmartInteractY];
1650 if (TileID.Sets.TileInteractRead[(int)tile.type])
1651 {
1652 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[81].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1653 }
1654 else
1655 {
1656 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[79].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1657 }
1658 }
1659 }
1660 else if (WiresUI.Settings.DrawToolModeUI)
1661 {
1662 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[89].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1663 }
1664 else if (ItemID.Sets.HasRightFire[item.type])
1665 {
1666 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Language.GetTextValue("UI.ActionAltAction"), new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
1667 }
1668 if ((!PlayerInput.GrappleAndInteractAreShared || (!WiresUI.Settings.DrawToolModeUI && (!Main.SmartInteractShowingGenuine || !Main.HasSmartInteractTarget) && (!Main.SmartInteractShowingFake || flag) && !ItemID.Sets.HasRightFire[item.type])) && Main.LocalPlayer.QuickGrapple_GetItemToUse() != null)
1669 {
1670 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[57].Value, new List<string>[] { keyConfiguration.KeyStatus["Grapple"] });
1671 }
1672 }
1673 }
1674 return text;
1675 }
1676
1677 // Token: 0x060016C9 RID: 5833 RVA: 0x004D9B44 File Offset: 0x004D7D44
1678 public static string BuildCommand(string CommandText, params List<string>[] Bindings)
1679 {
1680 string text = "";
1681 if (Bindings.Length == 0)
1682 {
1683 return text;
1684 }
1685 text += PlayerInput.GenerateGlyphList(Bindings[0]);
1686 for (int i = 1; i < Bindings.Length; i++)
1687 {
1688 string text2 = PlayerInput.GenerateGlyphList(Bindings[i]);
1689 if (text2.Length > 0)
1690 {
1691 text = text + "/" + text2;
1692 }
1693 }
1694 if (text.Length > 0)
1695 {
1696 text = text + ": " + CommandText + " ";
1697 }
1698 return text;
1699 }
1700
1701 // Token: 0x060016CA RID: 5834 RVA: 0x004D9BB8 File Offset: 0x004D7DB8
1702 public static string GenerateInputTag_ForCurrentGamemode(bool tagForGameplay, string triggerName)
1703 {
1704 if (PlayerInput.UsingGamepad)
1705 {
1706 return PlayerInput.GenerateGlyphList(PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[tagForGameplay ? InputMode.XBoxGamepad : InputMode.XBoxGamepadUI].KeyStatus[triggerName]);
1707 }
1708 return PlayerInput.GenerateRawInputList(PlayerInput.CurrentProfile.InputModes[InputMode.Keyboard].KeyStatus[triggerName]);
1709 }
1710
1711 // Token: 0x060016CB RID: 5835 RVA: 0x004D9C13 File Offset: 0x004D7E13
1712 private static string LocalizeKey(string keyName)
1713 {
1714 if (keyName == "Mouse1")
1715 {
1716 return Language.GetTextValue("Controls.LeftClick");
1717 }
1718 if (keyName == "Mouse2")
1719 {
1720 return Language.GetTextValue("Controls.RightClick");
1721 }
1722 return keyName;
1723 }
1724
1725 // Token: 0x060016CC RID: 5836 RVA: 0x004D9C48 File Offset: 0x004D7E48
1726 private static string GenerateGlyphList(List<string> list)
1727 {
1728 if (list.Count == 0)
1729 {
1730 return "";
1731 }
1732 string text = GlyphTagHandler.GenerateTag(list[0]);
1733 for (int i = 1; i < list.Count; i++)
1734 {
1735 text = text + "/" + GlyphTagHandler.GenerateTag(list[i]);
1736 }
1737 return text;
1738 }
1739
1740 // Token: 0x060016CD RID: 5837 RVA: 0x004D9C9C File Offset: 0x004D7E9C
1741 private static string GenerateRawInputList(List<string> list)
1742 {
1743 if (list.Count == 0)
1744 {
1745 return "";
1746 }
1747 string text = PlayerInput.LocalizeKey(list[0]);
1748 for (int i = 1; i < list.Count; i++)
1749 {
1750 text = text + "/" + PlayerInput.LocalizeKey(list[i]);
1751 }
1752 return text;
1753 }
1754
1755 // Token: 0x060016CE RID: 5838 RVA: 0x004D9CEE File Offset: 0x004D7EEE
1756 public static void NavigatorCachePosition()
1757 {
1758 PlayerInput.PreUIX = PlayerInput.MouseX;
1759 PlayerInput.PreUIY = PlayerInput.MouseY;
1760 }
1761
1762 // Token: 0x060016CF RID: 5839 RVA: 0x004D9D04 File Offset: 0x004D7F04
1763 public static void NavigatorUnCachePosition()
1764 {
1765 PlayerInput.MouseX = PlayerInput.PreUIX;
1766 PlayerInput.MouseY = PlayerInput.PreUIY;
1767 }
1768
1769 // Token: 0x060016D0 RID: 5840 RVA: 0x004D9D1A File Offset: 0x004D7F1A
1770 public static void LockOnCachePosition()
1771 {
1772 PlayerInput.PreLockOnX = PlayerInput.MouseX;
1773 PlayerInput.PreLockOnY = PlayerInput.MouseY;
1774 }
1775
1776 // Token: 0x060016D1 RID: 5841 RVA: 0x004D9D30 File Offset: 0x004D7F30
1777 public static void LockOnUnCachePosition()
1778 {
1779 PlayerInput.MouseX = PlayerInput.PreLockOnX;

1783 // Token: 0x060016D2 RID: 5842 RVA: 0x004D9D48 File Offset: 0x004D7F48
1784 public static void PrettyPrintProfiles(ref string text)
1785 {
1786 foreach (string text2 in text.Split(new string[] { "\r\n" }, StringSplitOptions.None))
1787 {
1788 if (text2.Contains(": {"))
1789 {
1790 string text3 = text2.Substring(0, text2.IndexOf('"'));
1791 string text4 = text2 + "\r\n ";
1792 string text5 = text4.Replace(": {\r\n ", ": \r\n" + text3 + "{\r\n ");
1793 text = text.Replace(text4, text5);
1794 }
1795 }
1796 text = text.Replace("[\r\n ", "[");
1797 text = text.Replace("[\r\n ", "[");
1798 text = text.Replace("\"\r\n ", "\"");
1799 text = text.Replace("\",\r\n ", "\", ");
1800 text = text.Replace("\",\r\n ", "\", ");
1801 text = text.Replace("\r\n ]", "]");
1802 }
1803
1804 // Token: 0x060016D3 RID: 5843 RVA: 0x004D9E48 File Offset: 0x004D8048
1805 public static void PrettyPrintProfilesOld(ref string text)
1806 {
1807 text = text.Replace(": {\r\n ", ": \r\n {\r\n ");
1808 text = text.Replace("[\r\n ", "[");
1809 text = text.Replace("\"\r\n ", "\"");
1810 text = text.Replace("\",\r\n ", "\", ");
1811 text = text.Replace("\r\n ]", "]");
1812 }
1813
1814 // Token: 0x060016D4 RID: 5844 RVA: 0x004D9EB4 File Offset: 0x004D80B4
1815 public static void Reset(KeyConfiguration c, PresetProfiles style, InputMode mode)
1816 {
1817 switch (style)
1818 {
1819 case PresetProfiles.Redigit:
1820 switch (mode)
1821 {
1822 case InputMode.Keyboard:
1823 c.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"].Add("Mouse1");
1824 c.KeyStatus["MouseRight"].Add("Mouse2");
1825 c.KeyStatus["Up"].Add("W");
1826 c.KeyStatus["Down"].Add("S");
1827 c.KeyStatus["Left"].Add("A");
1828 c.KeyStatus["Right"].Add("D");
1829 c.KeyStatus["Jump"].Add("Space");
1830 c.KeyStatus["Inventory"].Add("Escape");
1831 c.KeyStatus["Grapple"].Add("E");
1832 c.KeyStatus["SmartSelect"].Add("LeftShift");
1833 c.KeyStatus["SmartCursor"].Add("LeftControl");
1834 c.KeyStatus["QuickMount"].Add("R");
1835 c.KeyStatus["QuickHeal"].Add("H");
1836 c.KeyStatus["QuickMana"].Add("J");
1837 c.KeyStatus["QuickBuff"].Add("B");
1838 c.KeyStatus["MapStyle"].Add("Tab");
1839 c.KeyStatus["MapFull"].Add("M");
1840 c.KeyStatus["MapZoomIn"].Add("Add");
1841 c.KeyStatus["MapZoomOut"].Add("Subtract");
1842 c.KeyStatus["MapAlphaUp"].Add("PageUp");
1843 c.KeyStatus["MapAlphaDown"].Add("PageDown");
1844 c.KeyStatus["Hotbar1"].Add("D1");
1845 c.KeyStatus["Hotbar2"].Add("D2");
1846 c.KeyStatus["Hotbar3"].Add("D3");
1847 c.KeyStatus["Hotbar4"].Add("D4");
1848 c.KeyStatus["Hotbar5"].Add("D5");

2265 c.KeyStatus["DpadRadial4"].Add(string.Concat(Buttons.DPadLeft));
2266 c.KeyStatus["DpadRadial2"].Add(string.Concat(Buttons.DPadRight));
2267 c.KeyStatus["MenuUp"].Add(string.Concat(Buttons.DPadUp));
2268 c.KeyStatus["MenuDown"].Add(string.Concat(Buttons.DPadDown));
2269 c.KeyStatus["MenuLeft"].Add(string.Concat(Buttons.DPadLeft));
2270 c.KeyStatus["MenuRight"].Add(string.Concat(Buttons.DPadRight));
2271 break;
2272 default:
2273 return;
2274 }
2275 break;
2276 default:
2277 return;
2278 }
2279 }
2280

2292
2293 // Token: 0x060016D7 RID: 5847 RVA: 0x004DCD57 File Offset: 0x004DAF57
2294 public static void SetZoom_World()
2295 {
2296 PlayerInput.SetZoom_Unscaled();
2297 PlayerInput.SetZoom_MouseInWorld();
2298 }
2299
2300 // Token: 0x060016D8 RID: 5848 RVA: 0x004DCD63 File Offset: 0x004DAF63
2301 public static void SetZoom_Unscaled()
2302 {
2303 Main.lastMouseX = PlayerInput._originalLastMouseX;
2304 Main.lastMouseY = PlayerInput._originalLastMouseY;
2305 Main.mouseX = PlayerInput._originalMouseX;
2306 Main.mouseY = PlayerInput._originalMouseY;
2307 Main.screenWidth = PlayerInput._originalScreenWidth;
2308 Main.screenHeight = PlayerInput._originalScreenHeight;
2309 }
2310
2311 // Token: 0x060016D9 RID: 5849 RVA: 0x004DCDA4 File Offset: 0x004DAFA4
2312 public static void SetZoom_MouseInWorld()
2313 {
2314 Vector2 vector = Main.screenPosition + new Vector2((float)Main.screenWidth, (float)Main.screenHeight) / 2f;
2315 Vector2 vector2 = Main.screenPosition + new Vector2((float)PlayerInput._originalMouseX, (float)PlayerInput._originalMouseY);
2316 Vector2 vector3 = Main.screenPosition + new Vector2((float)PlayerInput._originalLastMouseX, (float)PlayerInput._originalLastMouseY);
2317 Vector2 vector4 = vector2 - vector;
2318 Vector2 vector5 = vector3 - vector;
2319 float num = 1f / Main.GameViewMatrix.RenderZoom.X;
2320 Vector2 vector6 = vector - Main.screenPosition + vector4 * num;
2321 Main.mouseX = (int)vector6.X;
2322 Main.mouseY = (int)vector6.Y;
2323 Vector2 vector7 = vector - Main.screenPosition + vector5 * num;
2324 Main.lastMouseX = (int)vector7.X;
2325 Main.lastMouseY = (int)vector7.Y;
2326 }
2327
2328 // Token: 0x060016DA RID: 5850 RVA: 0x004DCE94 File Offset: 0x004DB094
2329 private static void SetZoom_Scaled(float scale)
2330 {
2331 Main.lastMouseX = (int)((float)PlayerInput._originalLastMouseX * scale);
2332 Main.lastMouseY = (int)((float)PlayerInput._originalLastMouseY * scale);
2333 Main.mouseX = (int)((float)PlayerInput._originalMouseX * scale);
2334 Main.mouseY = (int)((float)PlayerInput._originalMouseY * scale);
2335 Main.screenWidth = (int)((float)PlayerInput._originalScreenWidth * scale);
2336 Main.screenHeight = (int)((float)PlayerInput._originalScreenHeight * scale);
2337 }

2665 public static void UpdateCounters()
2666 {

2668 {
2669 PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.FramesSinceLastTimeInMouseMode++;
2670 }
2671 }
2672
2673 // Token: 0x06003E8F RID: 16015 RVA: 0x00697FBF File Offset: 0x006961BF
2674 public static void TryRevertingToMouseMode()
2675 {
2676 if (PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.FramesSinceLastTimeInMouseMode > 0)
2677 {
2678 return;
2679 }
2680 PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.SetCursorMode(CursorMode.Mouse);
2681 PlayerInput.CurrentInputMode = InputMode.Mouse;
2682 PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.UsedMovementKey = false;
2683 PlayerInput.NavigatorUnCachePosition();
2684 }

2696 private struct FastUseItemMemory
2697 {
2698 // Token: 0x06003E90 RID: 16016 RVA: 0x00697FEC File Offset: 0x006961EC
2699 public bool TryStartForItemSlot(Player player, int itemSlot)
2700 {
2701 if (player.UsingOrReusingItem)
2702 {
2703 return false;
2704 }
2705 if (itemSlot < 0 || itemSlot >= 50)
2706 {
2707 this.Clear();
2708 return false;
2709 }
2710 this._player = player;
2711 this._slot = itemSlot;
2712 this._itemType = this._player.inventory[itemSlot].type;
2713 this._shouldFastUse = true;
2714 this._isMouseItem = false;
2715 ItemSlot.PickupItemIntoMouse(player.inventory, 0, itemSlot, player);
2716 return true;
2717 }
2718
2719 // Token: 0x06003E91 RID: 16017 RVA: 0x00698057 File Offset: 0x00696257
2720 public bool TryStartForMouse(Player player)
2721 {
2722 if (player.UsingOrReusingItem)
2723 {
2724 return false;
2725 }
2726 this._player = player;
2727 this._slot = -1;
2728 this._itemType = Main.mouseItem.type;
2729 this._shouldFastUse = true;
2730 this._isMouseItem = true;
2731 return true;
2732 }
2733
2734 // Token: 0x06003E92 RID: 16018 RVA: 0x00698090 File Offset: 0x00696290
2735 public void Clear()
2736 {
2737 this._shouldFastUse = false;
2738 }
2739
2740 // Token: 0x06003E93 RID: 16019 RVA: 0x0069809C File Offset: 0x0069629C
2741 public bool CanFastUse()
2742 {
2743 if (!this._shouldFastUse)
2744 {
2745 return false;
2746 }
2747 if (this._isMouseItem)
2748 {
2749 return Main.mouseItem.type == this._itemType;
2750 }
2751 return this._player.inventory[this._slot].type == this._itemType;
2752 }
2753
2754 // Token: 0x06003E94 RID: 16020 RVA: 0x006980F0 File Offset: 0x006962F0
2755 public void EndFastUse()
2756 {
2757 if (!this._shouldFastUse)
2758 {
2759 return;
2760 }
2761 if (!this._isMouseItem && this._player.inventory[this._slot].IsAir)
2762 {
2763 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref Main.mouseItem, ref this._player.inventory[this._slot]);
2764 }
2765 this.Clear();
2766 }
2767
2768 // Token: 0x0400675E RID: 26462
2769 private int _slot;
2770
2771 // Token: 0x0400675F RID: 26463
2772 private int _itemType;
2773
2774 // Token: 0x04006760 RID: 26464
2775 private bool _shouldFastUse;
2776
2777 // Token: 0x04006761 RID: 26465
2778 private bool _isMouseItem;
2779
2780 // Token: 0x04006762 RID: 26466
2781 private Player _player;
2782 }
2783 }
